Xamarin.Forms

item.title: Jun 7th - Jun 13th, 2021
item.description:
1. ebraminio/awesome-qsharp

IDE Integration

  • Jupyter Notebook

    • Books

  • Learn Quantum Computing with Python and Q# - Manning, 2021, Sarah Kaiser and Chris Granade.

    • 2. rust-unofficial/awesome-rust

    Libraries

    Graphics

  • Vulkan [vulkan]
    • vulkanostars2.7k [vulkano] —

    • Applications

  • habitat — An tool created by Chef to build, deploy, and manage applications.

    • Applications

    Games

  • Veloren — An open world, open source multiplayer voxel RPG game currently in alpha development

    • 3. agarrharr/awesome-cli-apps

    Productivity

    Time Tracking

  • Timetrapstars1.2k - Simple timetracker.

    • Productivity

    Note Taking and Lists

  • Taskwarrior - Manage your TODO list.
  • Terminal velocity - A fast note-taking app.
  • eurekastars331 - Input and store your ideas.

    • Command Line Learning

  • cmdchallenge - Presents small shell challenge with user submitted solutions.
  • explainshell - Type a snippet to see the help text for each argument.
  • howdoistars8.9k - Instant coding answers.
  • how2stars5.4k - Node.js implementation of howdoi.
  • teachcodestars330 - Guide for the earliest lessons of coding.

    • 4. unixorn/awesome-zsh-plugins

    Themes

  • kalistars2 - Includes git decorations.
  • ubunlystars4 - Mimics the Kali Linux console. Note - this theme also rebinds a lot of keys and sets a bunch of ZSH options that themes should leave alone.
  • gndxstars17 - Includes git status, hostname, directory and last command exit status decorations.
  • eleasticstars0 - Inspired by agnosterstars3.1k, optimized for solarized terminal theme, includes git status decorations. Requires powerline-compatible font.
  • xlk-simplestars1 - Simple theme with git decorations.

    • Plugins

  • cstars0 - Adds some git shortcuts.
  • posh-git-bashstars312 - Adds git status in your prompt.
  • atuinstars725 - Replaces your existing shell history with a SQLite database, and records additional context for your commands. Additionally, it provides optional and fully encrypted synchronisation of your history between machines, via an Atuin server.
  • cmdtimestars0 - Displays the duration of a command to the terminal forked from the timer plugin.

    • 5. matiassingers/awesome-readme

    Tools

  • Amazing GitHub Templatestars21 - Useful README.md, LICENSE, CONTRIBUTING.md, CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md, SECURITY.md, GitHub Issues, Pull Requests and Actions templates to jumpstart your projects.

    • 6. ziadoz/awesome-php

    Search

  • SphinxQL Query Builder - A query library for the Sphinx and Manticore search engines.

    • Code Analysis

  • GrumPHPstars3.5k - A PHP code-quality tool.

    • Static Site Generators

  • Jigsaw - Simple static sites with Laravel's Blade.

    • 7. avelino/awesome-go

    Utilities

  • clipboardstars46 - 📋 cross-platform clipboard package in Go.

    • 8. jaywcjlove/awesome-mac

    Audio and Video Tools

  • ffWorks - Comprehensive Media Tool for macOS. Making High Quality Video Encoding Accessible for Everyone.

    • 9. APA-Technology-Division/urban-and-regional-planning-resources

    Platforms and Software Resources

    Environmental and Climate Planning Tools and Platforms

  • HAZUS - FEMA’s Hazus Program provides standardized tools and data for estimating risk from earthquakes, floods, tsunamis, and hurricanes. Risk assessment resources and tools from the Hazus program are always freely available and transparently developed.

    • Platforms and Software Resources

    Urban Planning Tools and Platforms

  • ArcGIS Urban - ArcGIS Urban enables planners and design professionals to publish living plans and collaborate across teams with a web-based 3D application that supports scenario planning and impact assessment.

    • 10. aniftyco/awesome-tailwindcss

    Starters & Themes

  • 📟 Next.js PWAstars22 – CLI that generate boilerplate code of Next.js PWA along with Tailwind CSS integration.

    • 11. leomaurodesenv/game-datasets

    Artificial Intelligence

  • Halite by Two Sigma - Collect the halite during a match in space.

    • Miscellaneous

  • Gym OpenAI - Game toolkit for reinforcement learning algorithms.

    • 12. kolomied/awesome-cdk

    High-Level Frameworks

  • SSTstars1.8k - An open source framework for building serverless applications with CDK. It features a Live Lambda Development environment, to test and debug Lambda functions locally without having to redeploy them.
  • Orkestrastars21 - An event-driven alternative to Airflow built on the AWS CDK and Step Functions.

    • 13. n2cholas/awesome-jax

    Libraries

    New Libraries

  • CR.Sparsestars2 - XLA accelerated algorithms for sparse representations and compressive sensing.
  • flaxmodelsstars26 - Pretrained models for Jax/Flax.

    • Tutorials and Blog Posts

  • Writing an MCMC sampler in JAX by Jeremie Coullon - Tutorial on the different ways to write an MCMC sampler in JAX along with speed benchmarks.
  • How to add a progress bar to JAX scans and loops by Jeremie Coullon - Tutorial on how to add a progress bar to compiled loops in JAX using the host_callback module.

    • 14. TheJambo/awesome-testing

    Software

    Make your life easier

  • Synthstars393 - Open Source test data generator.

    • 15. dariubs/GoBooks

    Advanced Books

    Network Programming with Go

    Network Programming with Go will help you leverage Go to write secure, readable, production-ready network code. Network Programming with Go is all you'll need to take advantage of Go's built-in concurrency, rapid compiling, and rich standard library.


    16. mgramin/awesome-db-tools

    GUI Managers/Clients

  • Beekeeper Studiostars5.9k - Open Source SQL Editor and Database Manager with a privacy commitment in their mission statement.

    • 17. qinwf/awesome-R

    Web Technologies and Services

  • golem - A framework for building production-grade Shiny apps.

    • Graphic Displays

  • httpgdstars104 - Asynchronous http server graphics device for R.

    • Natural Language Processing

  • corporaexplorer - Dynamic exploration of text collections

    • 18. chainstack/awesome-corda

    Tools

  • Splunk App for Cordastars0 - Splunk official integration app for Corda monitoring.

    • 19. CUTR-at-USF/awesome-transit

    GTFS Validators

  • Conveyal's gtfs-validatorstars35 - A Java-based GTFS validator based on the OneBusAway GTFS Modules, runs in Java and is faster than the Google provided one.
  • Conveyal's gtfs-libstars38 - Conveyal's successor to their own gtfs-validatorstars35, a Java-based library for loading and saving GTFS feeds of arbitrary size with disk-backed storage.
  • Google's feedValidator - Google-supported Python-based GTFS validator.
  • GTFS Meta-Validator (hosted by Omni) - A web-based GTFS validator that runs both the Google Python feedValidator and Conveyal's gtfs-validatorstars35 on uploaded GTFS files.
  • gtfs-validator-apistars1 - This Python package is a thin wrapper around MobilityData/gtfs-validatorstars40 that handles intermediate files produced and finds gtfs-validator's output file so it can be given a specific name or returned as a string.

    • 20. ripienaar/free-for-dev

    Issue Tracking and Project Management

  • GForge — Project Management & Issue Tracking toolset for complex projects with self-premises and SaaS options. SaaS free plan offers first 5 users free & free for Open Source Projects.
  • nTask — Project management software that enables your teams tn collaborate, plan, analyze and manage everyday tasks. Basic Plan free forever with 100 MB storage, 5 users/team. Unlimited workspaces, meetings,tasks, timesheets and issue tracking.

    • IDE and Code Editing

  • Paiza — Develop Web apps in Browser without having the need to setup anything. Free Plan offers 1 server with 24 hours lifetime and 4 hours running time per day with 2 CPU cores, 2 GB RAM and 1 GB storage.

    • Storage and Media Processing

  • Storj — Decentralised Private Cloud Storage for Apps and Developers. Free plan provides 3 Projects, 50 GB storage per project/month , 50 GB bandwidth per project/month.

    • 21. alebcay/awesome-shell

    Multimedia and File Formats

  • yqstars3.8k - yq is a portable command-line YAML processor

    • Shell Script Development

  • shfmtstars3.7k - A shell parser, formatter, and interpreter with bash support; includes shfmt
  • getoptionsstars90 - An elegant option parser for shell scripts (sh, bash and all POSIX shells)
  • bashewstars58 - bash script creator - from small stand-alone script to complex projects with CI/CD and testing

    • Customization

  • starship - Fast, customisable, cross-shell prompt written in rust

    • 22. wardley-maps-community/awesome-wardley-maps

    Apps

    Commercial Enterprise Platforms

  • Wemvula - A visual transformation platform that provides the situational awareness to make sense of your interconnected web of needs, ideas, service components, supply contracts and change activities.

    • Apps

    Mapping

  • Mapkeep - Mapkeep is a place to keep 😉 your Wardley Maps. Create, share, and discuss maps with others. Host your maps for free with unlimited public repositories. For updates, you can follow @mapkeep on Twitter, subscribe to the YouTube Channel, or subscribe to the News and Updates blog.

    • Templates

    Mapping

  • Google Slides Mapping Template - Template for Google Slides.

    • 23. micromata/awesome-javascript-learning

    Books

  • Testing JavaScript Applications - A complete guide for JavaScript testing tools and techniques.

    • ES6 and above

  • What’s the difference between JavaScript and ECMAScript? - Clears the confusion about ES6 and Javascript.

    • 24. webpro/awesome-dotfiles

    Tools

  • comtryastars105 - Configuration management for localhost, written in Rust, for Linux, BSD, macOS, and Windows

    • 25. vuejs/awesome-vue

    Components & Libraries

    Tooltip

  • @adamdehaven/vue-custom-tooltipstars5 - Vue 2 & 3 🎉 customizable, reactive, and reusable tooltip component that supports plugin options, props, and multiple use-cases. Also works with SSR (e.g. VuePress, Nuxt) and includes TypeScript types. (Vue 3 is available on next branch/npm tag)

    • Projects Using Vue.js

    Open Source

  • GrandNode 2.0stars54 - Open Source Cross Platform E-Commerce Solution based on .NET Core 5.0 and MongoDB / Azure CosmosDB / Amazon DocumentDB / VueJS

    • 26. analysis-tools-dev/static-analysis

    Multiple languages

  • cqcstars332 - Check your code quality for js, jsx, vue, css, less, scss, sass and styl files.
  • imhotepstars214 - Comment on commits coming into your repository and check for syntactic errors and general lint warnings.
  • include-gardenerstars52 - A multi-language static analyzer for C/C++/Obj-C/Python/Ruby to create a graph (in dot or graphml format) which shows all #include relations of a given set of files.
  • Atom-Beautify ⚠️ - Beautify HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, Python, Ruby, Java, C, C++, C#, Objective-C, CoffeeScript, TypeScript, Coldfusion, SQL, and more in Atom editor.
  • ciocheckstars21 ⚠️ - Linter, formatter and test suite helper. As a linter, it is a wrapper around pep8, pydocstyle, flake8, and pylint.

    • 27. meirwah/awesome-incident-response

    IR tools Collection

    Incident Management

  • DFIRTrackstars269 - Incident Response tracking application handling one or more incidents via cases and tasks with a lot of affected systems and artifacts.

    • 28. bs-community/awesome-minecraft

    Softwares

    Libraries

  • go-mcprotostars10 - Minecraft server communication protocol implementation written in Go that allows you to program your own bots.

    • 29. KotlinBy/awesome-kotlin

    Android

    Libraries

  • MackHartley/DashedViewstars10 - The easiest way to create a dashed or striped background on Android

    • Libraries/Frameworks

    Testing

  • jcornaz/kwikstars16 - A property-based testing library for Kotlin. Execute tests with randomized inputs with a test-engine agnostic and compile-time safe library.
  • permissions-dispatcher/kompile-testingstars67 - Testing tools for kotlinc and kapt.

    • Libraries/Frameworks

    Database

  • consoleau/kotlin-jpa-specification-dslstars204 - This library provides a fluent DSL for querying spring data JPA repositories using spring data Specifications.

    • 30. sobolevn/awesome-cryptography

    Theory

    Asymmetric encryption

  • ECC - Public-key cryptosystems based on the algebraic structure of elliptic curves over finite fields.
  • RSA - One of the first practical public-key cryptosystems and is widely used for secure data transmission. In RSA, this asymmetry is based on the practical difficulty of factoring the product of two large prime numbers, the factoring problem.

    • Resources

    Web-sites

  • Cryptocurrencies Dashboard - A dashboard of most active cryptocurrencies discussed on Reddit.

    • 31. ellisonleao/magictools

    Graphics

    Vector/Image Editor

  • 🎉 LibreSprite - LibreSprite is an open source fork of Aseprite.
  • 💰 Affinity Designer - Vector graphics editor with a bunch of features which also supports Adobe file formats
  • 💰 Affinity Photo - Photo and raster graphics editor which works together with Adobe file formats and Affinity Designer
  • 💸 Aseprite - animated sprite editor & pixel art tool.
  • 🎉 Gimp - GNU Image Manipulation Program. It is a freely distributed piece of software for such tasks as photo retouching, image composition and image authoring.

    • Graphics

    Tile/Level Editors

  • 🎉 OGMO Editor- generic level editor.
  • 🆓 ArrayPainter - Array Painter is the easiest and fastest way to make 2D arrays ready for copy pasting into your own program.
  • 💰 AutoTileGen - AutoTileGen is an automatic tileset generator for 2D game terrains.
  • 🎉 LDtk - LDtk is an open-source 2D level editor for indie devs, with a strong focus on user-friendliness.
  • 🎉 Overlap2Dstars761 - a 2D level and UI editor with an engine agnostic philosophy.

    • Graphics

    Assets/Placeholders

  • 🆓 2D Cartoon Mobile Game UI Pack - cartoon user interface asset pack. It comes as a layered psd file.
  • 🆓 420 Pixel Art Icons for RPGs - Set of 420 RPG icons, free for commercial use.
  • 🆓 Blender 3D models - 3D models, particle systems/effects
  • 💸 CGTextures - A large collection of textures.
  • 💸 GameDev Market - a community-driven marketplace that connects indie game developers with talented asset creators.

    • 32. awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted

    Pastebins

  • dpaste - simple pastebin with multiple text and code option, with short url result easy to remember. (Source Codestars319) MIT Docker

    • 33. tayllan/awesome-algorithms

    Websites

  • CodeChef - Learning DSA by practice on Codechef

    • 34. razum2um/awesome-clojure

    Editor Plugins

  • proto-repl (Atom)

    • Advanced datastructures

  • specterstars2.2k: an elegant API for querying and transforming nested and recursive data

    • 35. TheComputerM/awesome-svelte

    UI Libraries

  • Sveltestrapstars580 - Bootstrap 4 & 5 components.

item.title: May 31st - Jun 6th, 2021
item.description:
1. ripienaar/free-for-dev

APIs, Data and ML

  • Scraper's Proxy — Simple HTTP proxy API made for scraping. Scrape anonymously without having to worry about restrictions, blocks or captchas. First 100 successfully scrape's per month free including javascript rendering (more available if you contact support).

    • Source Code Repos

  • codeberg.org - Unlimited public and private Git repos for free and open-source projects. Static website hosting with Codeberg Pages.

    • Miscellaneous

  • Base64 decoder/encoder — Online free tool for decoding & encoding data.

    • 2. sjfricke/awesome-webgl

    WebVR

    References

  • WebXR Device API - The W3C draft API for WebXR.
  • WebVR Spec - The official W3C WebVR spec (legacy).
    • How to read WebVR Specs

    • 3. DanailMinchev/awesome-eosio

    Learn

    Websites

  • EOS Smart Contract Development Security Best Practices
  • ESC - EOS Study Center
  • EOSIO Developer Portal - A great place to begin your EOSIO blockchain journey.

    • Tools

    General

  • All Things EOS

    • Learn

    Interactive learning, labs

  • Elemental Battles - Build a blockchain game. Learn EOSIO.
    • Announcing Elemental Battles: Block.one's New Tutorial for On-boarding Aspiring Blockchain Developers
  • Block.one: Getting Started with the EOSIO Blockchain and Smart Contracts - Google Cloud training lab.

    • 4. dlang-community/awesome-d

    GitHub Actions

  • setup-dlangstars32 - Install D compilers & DUB inside GitHub Actions
  • dub-upgradestars1 - Run dub upgrade trying to repeat on network failure and using package cache on GitHub Actions

    • Testing Frameworks

  • silly - Better test runner for the D programming language. No nonsense.
  • dunitstars62 - Advanced unit testing & mocking toolkit
  • unit-threadedstars113 - Multi-threaded unit test framework

    • 5. TheComputerM/awesome-svelte

    Dev Tools

    Docs

  • svelte-docsterstars4 - Generate metadata about your Svelte files from jsdoc.

    • Integrations

    Mobile

  • Svelte Native - Svelte controlling native components via Nativescript.
  • Framework7 - Full featured HTML framework for building iOS & Android apps.

    • Frameworks

  • SvelteKit - The fastest way to build Svelte apps.
  • Sapper - The next small thing in web development, powered by Svelte.
  • Elder.js - Opinionated static site generator and web framework for Svelte built with SEO in mind.
  • Routify - Routes for Svelte, automated by your file structure.
  • JungleJS - The Jamstack framework for Svelte with GraphQL.

    • 6. EbookFoundation/free-programming-books

    Misc

  • Holm School (You Might Learn Something) - How to Teach Yourself To Be A Computer Scientist for Hamiltons a Month - Ryhen Holm

    • Linux

  • Linux Inside

    • 7. APA-Technology-Division/urban-and-regional-planning-resources

    Public Data Resources

    Health

  • HealthData.gov - This site is dedicated to making high value health data in the United States more accessible to entrepreneurs, researchers, and policy makers in the hopes of better health outcomes for all.

    • Public Data Resources

    Environment and Ecosystem Services

  • National Wetland Inventory - The US Fish & Wildlife Service (FWS) National Wetlands Inventory (NWI) is a publicly available resource that provides detailed information on the abundance, characteristics, and distribution of US wetlands.
  • CropScape - CropScape displays data from the USDA Cropland Data Layer (CDL), an annual, remote-sensing snapshot of crop cover during the main growing season across the contiguous United States.

    • Public Data Resources

    Climate

  • NOAA Severe Weather Inventory - The Severe Weather Data Inventory (SWDI) is an integrated database of severe weather records for the United States. The formats currently supported are Shapefile (for GIS), KMZ (for Google Earth), CSV (comma-separated), and XML.

    • 8. unixorn/awesome-zsh-plugins

    Plugins

  • tmstars0 - Simplifies creating new tmux sessions, attaching to existing sessions, switching between sessions, and listing active sessions.
  • tmux-vim-integrationstars3 - Open files in a running vim (or NeoVim) session, from an adjacent tmux pane.
  • tmuxreplstars17 - Simple ZSH plugin to have a R-EP-L tmux session.
  • git-fuzzystars1.8k - A CLI interface to git that relies heavily on fzf.
  • liferaystars1 - Adds scripts for liferaystars1.7k development.

    • Completions

  • kubectl-fzfstars326 - Fast and powerful fzf-powered autocompletion for kubectl.

    • Themes

  • slickstars19 - Inspired by the purestars10.2k, pursstars209 and zsh-efgit-promptstars7. Requires cargo for installation.
  • tursstars0 - Fast, minimal Pursstars209-inspired prompt.
  • pursstars209 - A fast purestars10.2k-inspired prompt written in Rust.
  • starboystars0 - A simple ZSH theme.
  • starshipstars16.6k - Minimal, fast, extremely customizable.

    • 9. KotlinBy/awesome-kotlin

    Libraries/Frameworks

    Web

  • mvysny/vaadin-on-kotlinstars143 - A simple way to write full-stack database-backed component-oriented web apps

    • Libraries/Frameworks

    Database

  • cheptsov/kotlin-nosqlstars204 - NoSQL database query and access library for Kotlin.

    • Android

    Projects

  • halilozel1903/LearnKotlinProgrammingstars0 - Let's Learn Kotlin Programming ❤️
  • WilderPereira/ftwfystars1 - The real life Command/Ctrl + F - Android App that uses the Mobile Vision API to allow you to search for any occurrence of a text in a digital document.
  • adrielcafe/GreenHellCompanionAppstars3 - Unofficial companion app for the game Green Hell.
  • WilderPereira/lmgtfyGenstars4 - Simple Android App to generate Let Me Google That For You urls.
  • inshiro/Kodeshstars8 - Free and open source Bible for Android

    • 10. protontypes/awesome-robotic-tooling

    Documentation and Presentation

  • Zoterostars3.7k - A free, easy-to-use tool to help you collect, organize, cite, and share your research sources.

    • Sensor Processing

    Calibration and Transformation

  • e2calibstars51 - Contains code that implements video reconstruction from event data for calibration.

    • 11. awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted

    Calendaring and Contacts Management

    Social Networks and Forums

  • Nitter ⚠ - A alternative front end to twitter. (Source Codestars2.6k) AGPL-3.0 Nimble
  • Libreddit ⚠ - Private front-end for Reddit written in Rust. (Source Codestars647) AGPL-3.0 Rust

    • 12. agamm/awesome-developer-first

    CI/CD

  • CircleCI - YML to configure your builds, parallel jobs, jobs marketplace.
  • Gitlab - Open source CI and hosted solution with Github-like abilities.

    • Documentation

  • readme - Personalized and dynamic developer docs.
  • DeveloperHub - Collaborative developer documentation platform.

    • Environment & Secret Management

  • Vault - API driven secret key management.
  • Doppler - Environment variable management across projects, in one place.
  • 1Password Secrets Automation - Secrets management with integration to 1Password.
  • Envkey - Environment management with syncing mechanism for all apps.

    • 13. n2cholas/awesome-jax

    Libraries

    New Libraries

  • jaxliestars59 - Lie theory library for rigid body transformations and optimization.
  • BRAXstars105 - Differentiable physics engine to simulate environments along with learning algorithms to train agents for these environments.

    • 14. Urigo/awesome-meteor

    Deprecated

  • Meteor 1.4 + React For Everyone Tutorials
  • Meteor 1.4 For Everyone
  • Intermediate Meteor
  • Meteor For Everyone Tutorials
  • tuts+ - Single Page Web Apps with Meteor

    • Websites

  • Packosphere - Alternative front-end for Meteor package system, built by [Kelly Copley

    • Social

  • Official Twitter Account
  • Meteor Community Organization Slack Channelstars41

    • 15. mgramin/awesome-db-tools

    Wrappers

  • Saltcornstars281 - Open source no-code builder for web datatabase applications. Server and drag-and-drop UI builder, data stored in PostgreSQL or SQLite.

    • Monitoring/Statistics/Perfomance

    Prometheus

  • pgSCVstars48 - Metrics exporter for PostgreSQL and Postgres-related services.
  • postgres_exporterstars1.3k - Prometheus exporter for PostgreSQL server metrics.

    • Security

  • Databunkerstars750 - Special GDPR compliant secure vault for customer records built on top of regular DB.

    • 16. h4cc/awesome-elixir

    Books

  • Hands-on Elixir & OTP: Cryptocurrency trading bot - Want to learn Elixir & OTP by creating a real-world project? With Hands-on Elixir & OTP: Cryptocurrency trading bot you will gain hands-on experience by working on an interesting software project. We will explore all the key abstractions and essential principles through iterative implementation improvements. (2021).

    • 17. josephmisiti/awesome-machine-learning

    Python

    General-Purpose Machine Learning

  • FEDOTstars76: An AutoML framework for the automated design of composite modeling pipelines. It can handle classification, regression, and time series forecasting tasks on different types of data (including multi-modal datasets).

    • Python

    Reinforcement Learning

  • Mazestars130 - Application-oriented deep reinforcement learning framework addressing real-world decision problems.

    • 18. PatrickJS/awesome-angular

    Tables

  • ignite-ui-angular's grid - The data grid, tree grid, hierarchical grid in Ignite UI for Angularstars447 provide excel-style filtering, live-data, sorting, draggable row and other toolbar.

    • Community

  • [Top rated Angular stackoverflow questions Dashboard] (https://dashboard.nbshare.io/apps/stackoverflow/top-angular-questions/)

    • Misc Components

  • @ngneat/translocostars1.3k - 🚀 😍 The internationalization (i18n) library for Angular

    • 19. flame-engine/awesome-flame

    Projects

    Sports

  • Cycling Escape - Android, iOS, GitHubstars3 - You start off with only one rider. Compete in races to start earning money. Unlock more team mates and compete in more extreme and longer races. Keep going and win the ultimate world tour! By ikbendewilliam

    • 20. vuejs/awesome-vue

    Components & Libraries

    PDF

  • vue-pdf-embedstars0 - PDF embed component for Vue 2 and Vue 3

    • Components & Libraries

    Overlay

  • v3confirmstars0 - A plugin dedicated for vue3 to show confirm dialog modal.

    • Components & Libraries

    Fullscreen

  • vue-fullscreenstars344 - A simple Vue component for fullscreen, support Vue2 and Vue3.

    • 21. sachin1092/awesome-material

    CSS

  • Tronic247 Material - A material design framework based on jQuery and CSS

    • 22. sindresorhus/awesome

    Miscellaneous

  • Urban & Regional Planningstars24 - Concerning the built environment and communities.

    • 23. danielecook/Awesome-Bioinformatics

    Next Generation Sequencing

    Assembly

  • SPAdesstars320 - SPAdes (St. Petersburg genome assembler) is an assembly toolkit containing various assembly pipelines and the de-facto standard for prokaryotic genome assemblies.
  • SKESAstars63 - SKESA is a de-novo sequence read assembler for microbial genomes. It uses conservative heuristics and is designed to create breaks at repeat regions in the genome. This leads to excellent sequence quality without significantly compromising contiguity.

    • Next Generation Sequencing

    Annotation

  • Prokkastars470 - Prokka: rapid prokaryotic genome annotation. Prokka is one of the most cited annotation command line tools for microbial genome annotations.
  • Baktastars73 - Bakta is a tool for the rapid & standardized annotation of bacterial genomes & plasmids. It provides dbxref-rich and sORF-including annotations in machine-readable JSON & bioinformatics standard file formats for automatic downstream analysis.

    • Next Generation Sequencing

    Sequence Processing

  • SeqFustars18 - Sequence manipulation toolkit for FASTA/FASTQ files written in Nim. [ paper-2021 | web ]

    • 24. typeddjango/awesome-python-typing

    Backports and improvements

  • typing_utilsstars4 - Backport 3.8+ runtime typing utils(for eg: get_origin) & add issubtype & more.

    • Tools

    Working with types

  • mypy-silentstars3 - Silence mypy by adding or removing code comments.
  • com2annstars90 - Tool for translation of type comments to type annotations in Python.

    • 25. ohenley/awesome-ada

    Applications

    Misc

  • septumstars9 - An interactive context-based text search tool for searching large codebases.

    • 26. avelino/awesome-go

    Third-party APIs

  • go-swagger-uistars0 - Go library containing precompiled Swagger UI for serving swagger json.

    • Authentication and OAuth

  • otpgenstars3 - Library to generate TOTP/HOTP codes.

    • JSON

  • ujsonstars45 - Fast and minimal JSON parser and transformer that works on unstructured JSON.

    • 27. uraimo/awesome-software-patreons

    Open Source Projects

  • GIMP - GNU Image Manipulation Program.
  • JabRef - Software for bibliography management
  • OpenRGB - RGB lighting control application.

    • Open Source Projects

    Operating Systems

  • /e/ - Privacy-focused mobile OS.
  • GrapheneOS - A privacy and security focused mobile OS with Android app compatibility.
  • Mobian - Debian for mobile.

    • 28. rossant/awesome-math

    Go 101 Free

    Go 101 is a book focusing on Go syntax/semantics and all kinds of runtime related things (Go 1.17-pre ready) and tries to help gophers gain a deep and thorough understanding of Go. This book also collects many details of Go and in Go programming. It is expected that this book is helpful for both beginner and experienced Go programmers.

    Advanced Books

    Security with Go

    Security with Go is the first Golang security book, and it is useful for both blue team and red team applications. With this book, you will learn how to write secure software, monitor your systems, secure your data, attack systems, and extract information.

    Defensive topics include cryptography, forensics, packet capturing, and building secure web applications.

    Offensive topics include brute force, port scanning, packet injection, web scraping, social engineering, and post exploitation techniques.

    JVM languages

  • Eclipse CargoTracker - This project demonstrates how you can develop applications with the Jakarta EE platform using widely adopted architectural best practices like Domain-Driven Design (DDD). The codestars121 is intended to mirror a non-trivial application that developers in the real work would work on. It attempts to demonstrate first-hand how you can use Jakarta EE to effectively meet practical enterprise concerns such as productivity, agility, testability, flexibility, maintainability, scalability and security. The project is directly based on the well known original Java DDD sample applicationstars3.4k developed by DDD pioneer Eric Evans' company Domain Language and the Swedish software consulting company Citerus.

    Take your Go skills to the next level by learning how to design, develop, and deploy a distributed service. Start from the bare essentials of storage handling, work your way through networking a client and server, turn that single-node application into a distributed system with service discovery and consensus, and then deploy your service to the cloud.   • SketchUp - Easy to use interactive 3D modeling software for planning and design applications. Supported by a rich asset library for creating neighborhood designs.

item.title: May 17th - May 23rd, 2021
item.description:
1. DanailMinchev/awesome-eosio

    Where to start

  • Practical Introduction to Container Terminology The landscape for container technologies is larger than just docker. Without a good handle on the terminology, It can be difficult to grasp the key differences between docker and (pick your favorites, CRI-O, rkt, lxc/lxd) or understand what the Open Container Initiative is doing to standardize container technology.
  • The Docker Handbook An open-source book that teaches you the fundamentals, best practices and some intermediate Docker functionalities. The book is hosted on fhsinchy/the-docker-handbookstars374 and the projects are hosted on fhsinchy/docker-handbook-projectsstars785 repository.

    • Docker Images

    Registry

    • 6. unixorn/awesome-zsh-plugins

    Themes

  • minimal (5amu)stars1 - Minimal prompt, uses nerdfonts. Includes git and vpn status decorations.
  • gitster (zimfw)stars2 - Zim fork of shashankmehta's gitster prompt theme
  • gitsterv2stars0 - Forked from the original gitster theme.
  • lukerandall-extendedstars1 - Extended version of the lukerandall theme. Includes decorations for git status and the status of the last command run.
  • kidostars4 - Based on ys and robbyrussell themes. Includes decorators for the exit code of the last command run, python virtualenv and VCS status.

    • Plugins

  • terraform (thuandt)stars0 - Adds convenience aliases for terraform, along with completions for terraform and terragrunt.
  • gitstatusstars0 - Makes it easy to show your git status in your prompt.
  • ugitstars201 - Lets you undo your last git operation.

    • 7. KotlinBy/awesome-kotlin

  • android-password-store/Android-Password-Storestars1.8k - Android application compatible with ZX2C4's Pass command line application.

    More Collections

  • OWASP Source Code Analysis Tools - List of tools maintained by the Open Web Application Security Project

    • Multiple languages

  • lizardstars1.1k - Lizard is an extensible Cyclomatic Complexity Analyzer for many programming languages including C/C++ (doesn't require all the header files or Java imports). It also does copy-paste detection (code clone detection/code duplicate detection) and many other forms of static code analysis. Counts lines of code without comments, CCN (cyclomatic complexity number), token count of functions, parameter count of functions.

    • 11. APA-Technology-Division/urban-and-regional-planning-resources

    Public Data Resources

    Environment and Ecosystem Services

  • Park Score - The Trust for Public Land curates a comprehensive evaluation of park access and quality in the 100 largest U.S. cities.
  • NLCD - The National Land Cover Database is generated in cooperation with the Multi-Resolution Land Characteristics Consortium (MRLC), a partnership of Federal agencies working together to produce current, nationally consistent, land cover products for all 50 US states and Puerto Rico.
  • EnviroAtlas - EnviroAtlas is a collection of interactive tools and resources that allows users to explore the many benefits people receive from nature, often referred to as ecosystem services within the United States.
  • National Hydrography - The NHDPlus High Resolution (NHDPlus HR), National Hydrography Dataset (NHD), and Watershed Boundary Dataset (WBD) are available for download and as map services. These datasets can help inform environmental planning and storm water management efforts in the US.

    • Public Data Resources

    Resilience and Natural Hazards

  • Earth Quake Data - NOAA provided data includes a global record of significant earth quakes going back to 2150 BC to present with geographic information.
  • Sea Level Rise Viewer - NOAA provided map viewer is to provide federal, state, and local coastal resource managers and planners with a preliminary look at sea level rise and coastal flooding impacts.

    • Public Data Resources

    OpenStreetMap

  • BBBike - Provides shapefiles and raw OSM format for cities around the world, extracted weekly. This is useful if you are looking for data extracts for a single city.
  • Geofabrik - OpenStreetMap extracts prepared in either PBF or shapefile format for download daily.
  • OpenStreetMap - OpenStreetMap is the free wiki world map. This colloborative project is one of the largest databases of volunteered geographic information in the world. Its contents include points of interest, routable networks, and other geodata.
  • MetroExtracts - Each day, OSM Extracts by Interline mirrors the entire OpenStreetMap planet and creates city and region sized extracts ready for download into formats ready for GIS.
  • Overpass Turbo - Overpass Turbo is a web-based data mining tool for OpenStreetMap. It runs any kind of Overpass API query, shows the results on an interactive map, and allows users to export query data in the form of GeoJSON files (which may be converted to Shapefiles). It also provides helpful support for new users in the form of the "Wizard" tool. Using Overpass Turbo, you can query virtually any location globally using dedicated tags in Open Street Map.

The presentation focuses on Terraform modules, but also provides a brief and clear explanation of what problem Terraform was created to solve and a short demo of Terraform basics (~39 min, October 2017).

    • 32. awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted

  • ChiefOnboarding - Employee onboarding platform that allows you to provision user accounts and create sequences with todo items, resources, text/email/Slack messages, and more! Available as a web portal and Slack bot. (Source Codestars89) AGPL-3.0 Python

item.title: May 10th - May 16th, 2021
item.description:
1. ripienaar/free-for-dev

PaaS

  • glitch.com — Free public hosting with features such as code sharing and real-time collaboration. Free plan has 1000 hours/month limit.
  • Railway - Railway is an infrastructure platform where you can provision infrastructure, develop with that infrastructure locally, and then deploy to the cloud. 3 Projects, 2 Plugins / Project, 2 Evironments / Project, 3 Live Deploys / Environment available for free.

    • Code Quality

  • SoftaCheck — An online tool that performs static analysis for C/C++ code using open source tools such as cppcheck and clang-tidy and automatically generates code documentation for users using doxygen. This tool is free for use.

    • Monitoring

  • OnlineOrNot.com - 10 uptime monitors with a 5 minute interval, 1 page speed monitors with a 12 hour interval. Free alerts via Slack and Email.

    • 2. fffaraz/awesome-cpp

    Logging

  • fmtlogstars143 - A performant fmtlib-style logging library with latency in nanoseconds. [MIT]

    • 3. fabacab/awesome-cybersecurity-blueteam

    DevSecOps

  • helm-secretsstars268 - Helm plugin that helps manage secrets with Git workflow and stores them anywhere, backed by SOPS.

    • 4. mourarthur/awesome-credit-modeling

    Model Explainability

  • Regulatory learning: How to supervise machine learning models? An application to credit scoring - The arrival of Big Data strategies is threatening the latest trends in financial regulation related to the simplification of models and the enhancement of the comparability of approaches chosen by financial institutions. Indeed, the intrinsic dynamic philosophy of Big Data strategies is almost incompatible with the current legal and regulatory framework as illustrated in this paper. Besides, the model selection may also evolve dynamically forcing both practitioners and regulators to develop libraries of models, strategies allowing to switch from one to the other as well as supervising approaches allowing financial institutions to innovate in a risk mitigated environment.

    • 5. dariubs/GoBooks

    Advanced Books

    Go with the Domain: Building Modern Business Software in Go Free

    Go with the Domain is a book on building Go applications that solve complex problems in an idiomatic way. It features techniques like Domain-Driven Design, Clean Architecture, CQRS (Command Query Responsibility Segregation), and other patterns.

    The book is based on a real open source projectstars897. Chapters go through refactoring of the project to show common anti-patterns and how to avoid them.


    6. h4cc/awesome-elixir

    Authentication

  • guardian_dbstars316 - An extension to Guardian that tracks tokens in your application's database to prevent playback. (Docs).
  • guardian_redisstars2 - Redis repository for Guardian DB. (Docs).

    • Security

  • code_signingstars4 - Signing and verifying BEAM files with Ed25519 signatures.

    • 7. avelino/awesome-go

    UUID

  • goflakestars3 - A small, scalable, & serverless unique ID generator for use in distributed systems. Inspired by Twitters Snowflake.

    • Command Line

    Advanced Console UIs

  • markerstars19 - Easiest way to match and mark strings for colorful terminal outputs.

    • Data Structures

  • parapipestars9 - FIFO Pipeline which parallels execution on each stage while maintaining the order of messages and results.
  • dsustars4 - Disjoint Set data structure implementation in Go.

    • 8. KotlinBy/awesome-kotlin

    Links

    Official Links

  • Kotlin/KEEPstars2.2k - Kotlin Evolution and Enhancement Process
  • Kotlin Forum

    • Links

    Resources

  • tbhaxor/GUIDE-TO-KOTLINstars8 - A practical guide on Kotlin for Developers
  • AlexeySoshin/Hands-on-Design-Patterns-with-Kotlinstars17 - Code examples for 'Hands-on Design Patterns with Kotlin' book
  • From Java To Kotlinstars536 - From Java to Kotlin Cheat Sheet
  • dbacinski/Design-Patterns-In-Kotlinstars4.6k - Design Patterns implemented in Kotlin
  • Awesome Kotlin Jobsstars8 - A curated list of companies using Kotlin

    • Libraries/Frameworks

    Web

  • welvet/summer - Lightweight Jetty/JDBC wrapper library inspired by SparkJava and MyBatis with DI and Testing support for Kotlin
  • laviua/komockstars8 - HTTP/Consul/SMTP/Spring Config mocker framework written in Kotlin
  • AurityLab/graphql-kotlin-toolkitstars8 - GraphQL toolkit for Kotlin (includes code generator and spring boot integration)
  • darkredz/zeko-restapi-frameworkstars9 - Asynchronous web framework for Kotlin. Create REST APIs in Kotlin easily with automatic Swagger/OpenAPI doc generation
  • phenax/hstars11 - HTML templating library written in Kotlin

    • 9. kdeldycke/awesome-iam

    Authentication

    OAuth2 & OpenID

  • PKCE Explained - “PKCE is used to provide one more security layer to the authorization code flow in OAuth and OpenID Connect.”

    • 10. agarrharr/awesome-cli-apps

    Development

    Database

  • usqlstars6.4k - Universal SQL client with autocompletion and syntax highlighting.

    • 11. unixorn/awesome-zsh-plugins

    Plugins

  • arduinostars2 - Adds scripts to build, upload and monitor arduino sketches from a command line. Requires jq.

    • Completions

  • nxstars26 - Completions for nx. Requires jq.
  • fzf-zsh-completionsstars43 - Fuzzy completions for fzfstars36.6k and ZSH that can be triggered by a trigger sequence that defaults to **.
  • insprstars0 - Completions for insprstars34

    • Themes

  • r3nic1estars0 - Agnosterstars3.1k variant with battery status, git/hg status, time, kubernetes context and namespace, non-zero exit code of last command and date decorations. Requires Powerline font.
  • remiiistars7 - Based on Agnosterstars3.1k, optimized for solarizedstars14.8k terminal themes.
  • spowerline - Written in scala, inspired by Agnosterstars3.1k, tmux powerline, vim powerline and the vim status plugin.
  • termuxerstars12 - Theme inspired by Agnosterstars3.1k and linuxer.
  • zysstars8 - Similar to Agnosterstars3.1k, designed to disclose information contextually, with a powerline aesthetic.

    • 12. matiassingers/awesome-readme

    Examples

  • priyavrat-misra/xrays-and-gradcamstars14 - TOC for easy navigation. Clear introduction of what the project does. Complete list of all files in the repo and what their function is. Usage section. Clean and concise tables.

    Libraries

    ADC

  • MicroPython-ADC_Calstars0 - ESP32 ADC driver using reference voltage calibration value from efuse.

    Engines

    LaTeX formulas on the web

  • Purple Pistars24 - Browser extension that lets you use LaTeX in GitHub pages, StackOverflow etc.
  • mimeTeX - mimeTeX is a rather old tool to render LaTeX formulas to PNG figures for your web site, without actually needing a LaTeX installation on your server.
  • mathTeX - mathTeX is the successor of mimeTeX: it produces nicer-looking images but it requires LaTeX to be installed on your server.
  • MathJaX - JavaScript engine to render mathematical formulas on the web. The outcome looks really slick.
  • KaTeX - KaTeX is a math rendering library made by Khan Academy focusing on fast load times. All output is processed as plain HTML instead of fixed images.
